category_title: Young children with persistent challenging behaviors across multiple routines
minimal_context: Kayden is at home and is being prompted to start getting ready for bed.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Kayden, it is time to start getting ready for bed.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We have to get ready for bed now.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Kayden, it is time to start getting ready for bed.

STUDENT: (Starts crying)

TUTOR: Let's go get your pajamas.

STUDENT: (Screams)

TUTOR: We have to get ready for bed now.

STUDENT: (Screams and begins hitting)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Receiving a verbal prompt from mom for Kayden to start to get ready for bed

behavior_patterns.condition: At some point between delivery of the prompt and Kayden actually falling asleep
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Some amount of screaming, crying, and/or hitting will likely occur
